title: feat: improve mobile push notification UX
head: zamadye:main
body:
## Summary

Implements the mobile push notification UX improvements as specified in issue #87.

## Changes

### Non-intrusive Permission Request Flow
- No page load prompts: Implemented 30+ second activity tracking before showing permission banner
- Activity detection: Tracks user interactions (click, scroll, keyboard, mouse move, touch)
- Inactivity reset: Resets tracking after 1 minute of inactivity
- Persistent state: Permission state saved in localStorage

### Enhanced Pre-Permission Banner
- Clear benefits explanation: Shows exactly what users will get
- Improved UI: Better styling with icons, animations, and mobile responsiveness
- Two-button design: 'Activar' and 'Ahora no' as specified

### Enhanced Notification Preferences Modal
- New category structure:
  - Pagos y Cobros (payment reminders, receipts)
  - Grupos (member joins, cycle advances)
  - Marketplace (orders, messages)
  - Social (likes, comments, mentions)
- Master toggle: 'Silenciar todo' to disable all notifications
- Better UX: Disabled state handling when 'Silenciar todo' is active
- Quiet hours integration: Works with existing quiet hours functionality

### Technical Improvements
- Persistent permission tracking: Respects user decisions (max 3 prompts)
- Progressive delays: 1 day wait after first dismiss, 7 days after second
- Backwards compatibility: Maintains legacy preference fields
- API integration: Category toggles save to PUT /api/notifications/preferences

## Testing
- Tested permission flow timing (30+ seconds activity)
- Verified localStorage persistence
- Tested category toggles and master 'Silenciar todo' switch
- Verified quiet hours integration
- Mobile responsive design tested
- FCM and VAPID push subscription maintained

## Acceptance Criteria
- Non-intrusive permission prompt (not on page load)
- Permission state persisted in localStorage
- Category toggles save to API (PUT /api/notifications/preferences)
- Improved UI with clear benefits explanation
- 'Activar' and 'Ahora no' buttons
- Respects quiet hours settings
- Mobile responsive
- Master 'Silenciar todo' toggle

## Bounty Claim

This PR completes the requirements for Issue #87: Mobile Push Notification UX - 250 LTD Bounty

Resolves #87
